commands: FOO=1 vite run hello # hit cache
FOO=2 vite run hello # env changed
FOO=2 BAR=1 vite run hello # env added
VITE_TASK_PASS_THROUGH_ENVS=PTE vite run hello # passThroughEnvs changed
# set cwd via env var (keep passThroughEnvs from previous step)
VITE_TASK_PASS_THROUGH_ENVS=PTE VITE_TASK_CWD=subfolder vite run hello # cwd changed
